g.text: expand each x to x and x*10

div.p: Models computations with multiple possible results. Each element independently goes through the next step, and all results are flattened.
bind (>>=) = flatMap / concatMap: apply f to every element, then flatten all resulting lists into one.

g.title: Apply f to every element in List<a>, then concatenate all resulting lists.
For each x in the input list, produce pairs with every element of the second list, then flatten all results.
Apply f to every element in List<a>, then concatenate all resulting lists.
For each x in the input list, produce pairs with every element of the second list, then flatten all results.
